findings.description: PascalCase class names present in s2 content but absent from hints: ServiceAvailabilityCheckHandler and NablarchTagHandler. Both are listed in the source under their respective handler categories.
findings.source_evidence: :doc:`../handler/ServiceAvailabilityCheckHandler` and :doc:`../handler/NablarchTagHandler` appear in the source handler lists for s2.

findings.description: PascalCase class names present in s3 content but absent from hints: GlobalErrorHandler (appears in the XML handler queue example) and RepositoryBasedWebFrontController (appears in the web.xml deployment descriptor example).
findings.source_evidence: `nablarch.fw.handler.GlobalErrorHandler` in the handlerQueue XML block; `nablarch.fw.web.servlet.RepositoryBasedWebFrontController` in the web-app filter-class element of the deployment descriptor example.
